allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(frontend\): implementa SPA React com login e painel do setor

Stack: React 19 + Vite + TypeScript + shadcn/ui + Tailwind CSS + React Router.
Inclui tela de login \(usuario/senha/perfil\), painel do setor com abas de
emprestimo e devolucao, HTTP client com interceptor 401, componentes shadcn/ui
e guard de autenticacao. Backend ajustado para servir frontend/dist com
fallback SPA. TDD e CLAUDE.md atualizados com nova stack.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
